testcase.name: [It] Region Discovery When listing regions Given valid organization access should return all available regions
testcase.system-err: > Enter [It] should return all available regions - /home/runner/work/uni-region/uni-region/test/api/suites/regions_test.go:38 @ 05/19/26 08:16:09.729 Found 4 regions < Exit [It] should return all available regions - /home/runner/work/uni-region/uni-region/test/api/suites/regions_test.go:38 @ 05/19/26 08:16:10.615 (887ms)

testcase.name: [It] File Storage Management When listing file storage resources Given invalid parameters should reject requests with invalid organization ID format

skipped.message: skipped - Bug INST-457: File Storage API accepts invalid organizationId and returns data for different organization

testcase.system-err: > Enter [It] should reject requests with invalid organization ID format - /home/runner/work/uni-region/uni-region/test/api/suites/filestorage_test.go:127 @ 05/19/26 08:16:11.979 [SKIPPED] Bug INST-457: File Storage API accepts invalid organizationId and returns data for different organization

testcase.name: [It] File Storage Management When managing file storage attachments Given a network and file storage resource should delete the network resource

failure.message: Expected success, but got an error: deleting filestorage: expected 202, got 404, body: {"error":"not_found","error_description":"resource not found","trace_id":"redacted-trace-id"} (traceID=redacted-trace-id spanID=redacted-span-id): unexpected status code

testcase.failure: [FAILED] Expected success, but got an error: deleting filestorage: expected 202, got 404, body: {"error":"not_found","error_description":"resource not found","trace_id":"redacted-trace-id"} (traceID=redacted-trace-id spanID=redacted-span-id): unexpected status code In [AfterAll] at: /home/runner/work/uni-region/uni-region/test/api/suites/filestorage_test.go:620 @ 05/19/26 08:17:43.417
testcase.system-err: > Enter [It] should delete the network resource - /home/runner/work/uni-region/uni-region/test/api/suites/filestorage_test.go:585 @ 05/19/26 08:17:37.803 Deleted network: redacted-network-id Confirmed network deleted: redacted-network-id [FAILED] Expected success, but got an error: deleting filestorage: expected 202, got 404
